name: craft
description: Opinionated engineering-discipline tooling for Copilot CLI. Two workflow skills (implementation: aim, design, deliver in validated tested slices; decompose: break a goal into the roadmap->plan->item hierarchy), two stdio MCP servers on a shared git-backed storage adapter -- craft-journal (resume continuity + BM25 findings reuse) and craft-compose (roadmap->plan->item work composition with deterministic roll-up) -- and a Node hook dispatcher (resume injector, work-tree injector, draft seeder, findings-consult signal, failure capture). Cross-machine sync at the adapter. Host-agnostic; Microsoft-internal use. See README.md.
